title: Fireplace Warm Evening
summary: Cozy 60 BPM soundscape  -  crackling fire under soft piano chords and a distant cello drone.
prompt: A warm evening soundscape with light musical underscore at 60 BPM. Crackling fireplace sounds layered with very soft slow piano chords in a major key, distant low cello drone, occasional faint chime. Cozy winter-cabin-at-night atmosphere. Tranquil, intimate, dreamlike.
